concept: Overthinking everything since the dawn of time
title: Funny Overthinking Quote Shirt - Perfect Sarcastic Gift for Relatable Overthinkers
description:
Is your brain constantly running a marathon it didn't sign up for? Celebrate the endless loop of 'what-ifs' and unnecessary analysis with this hilariously relatable design. Whether you're second-guessing a text you sent three weeks ago or spiraling after ordering extra guac, this one's for you. 

Perfect for:
- Overthinkers who find humor in their own chaos
- Friends who give the best advice but never take their own
- That coworker who re-reads every email three times

DETAILS: This typography-driven design features a clean layout with bold, quirky text that reads: 'Overthinking everything since the dawn of time.' The hand-lettered style is both minimal and playful, with pops of color to keep it fresh and fun. Available in a full range of light and dark garment colors to suit your mood and wardrobe. Made-to-order just for you, it's the perfect blend of self-deprecating humor and stylish functionality.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
